name: Baked Oysters with Noodles Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup liquid (liquid from oysters and cream to make 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles; drain and rinse in cold water.
2. Heat butter; add flour; stir until smooth.
3. Add liquid and cook until thick.
4. Add shredded cheese and melt.
5. Add noodles, oysters, and mushrooms to the sauce. Blend well.
6. Put mixture in a 1-quart casserole dish.
7. Top with buttered crumbs.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
